content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +0.87%, BankNifty +1.39%, Realty leading at +2.14%, and India VIX crashing -6.71% to 17.53 indicating fear compression. Strong Q4 earnings cycle underway (ICICI, HDFC, Nestle, Mahabank, PNBH all beating estimates). Momentum is intact but several of our holdings are extended short-term, so priority is locking in SLs/targets rather than chasing.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24350,
      "nifty_resistance": 24800
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ICICIBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.00,
      "new_target": 1460.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit if target not reached within 10 trading days or if BankNifty breaks below 56000.",
      "reasoning": "Q4 FY26 was a clean beat — PAT +8.5%, sector-leading NIM 4.32%, GNPA 1.40%, provisions collapsed. Price just broke out above prior range and is near SMA200. Setting SL at 1355 (~2.4% below entry, just below pivot support of 1344 and today's low). Target 1460 offers ~5% upside (R:R ~2:1). Stock is leader of the banking rally with strongest fundamentals."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 1335.00,
      "new_target": 1470.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Book partial at 1440, trail remainder. Exit fully if not at target in 10 days.",
      "reasoning": "Best quarterly print in 9 years — PAT +27%, revenue +23%, EBITDA margin 26.3%, volume growth high double-digits. Stock broke out of multi-month base above 1340 resistance, now at 52-week high. Entry was at the close of a massive +7.27% day so pullback risk is real. SL 1335 just below breakout level (~3.3% below entry) protects capital on a failed breakout. Target 1470 (~6.5% upside) is the logical next resistance from measured move."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 76.50,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit or trail aggressively if QIP/equity raise pricing is announced. Exit if not at target in 8 days.",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 — PAT +35% YoY, NNPA 0.13% (best in PSU), advances +21.7%. Hit 52-week high on 2.4x volume. Caveat: Rs 7,500 cr equity raise is overhang that could cap upside. SL at 76.50 (~4.6% below, just below prior 52wk high breakout zone of 77). Target 88 (~9.8% upside) to ride the PSU bank momentum. Tighter time stop given dilution risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ZENTEC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 1640.00,
      "new_target": 1920.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "time_exit_plan": "Book 50% at 1850 to lock in gains given chase risk; trail SL on rest. Exit fully if not at target in 7 days.",
      "reasoning": "Arms manufacturing licence is a genuine catalyst but stock is up +33% in 30 days and +17% in 5 sessions — classic chase-risk setup. Today's intraday candle (H 1825, close 1742) shows distribution from highs. SL 1640 (~5.9% below entry) just below today's close of the prior candle (1643) which is the breakout level. Target 1920 to 52wk-high retest zone. Lower confidence due to extended price and mid-cap defence momentum fragility."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "ICICIBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.00,
      "reasoning": "Strongest fundamental setup among large banks. Hold with SL at 1355 to allow normal volatility while protecting 2.4% max risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1335.00,
      "reasoning": "Blowout Q4 breakout day — keep position but SL tight below breakout level given +7% run-up might retrace."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 76.50,
      "reasoning": "Earnings momentum intact but equity dilution overhang. Tight SL, shorter timeframe."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ZENTEC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1640.00,
      "reasoning": "Extended run with distribution candle today — SL below breakout at 1640. Plan partial booking at 1850."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "PNBHOUSING: Strong Q4 beat, GNPA sub-1%, want to enter on pullback to 920-940 zone (prior resistance now support). GROWW: Premium valuation and +113% from IPO — wait for pullback to 190-195 before considering. TATAELXSI: Bullish Q4 but IT sector overhang; want to see follow-through close above 4700 before entering. TRITURBINE: 15x volume on a -1% day is suspicious (distribution, not accumulation). Avoid chasing. DEEPAKNTR: Research flags BEARISH (margin compression, GST adverse order, PC oversupply, P/E 39x) — skip despite today's bounce. HDFCBANK: NII growth lagging ICICI; prefer ICICI exposure I already hold. AUBANK: Wait for Q4 print Apr 25 before entry. SOBHA/KEC/ELECON: No clear edge — pass.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Portfolio is 27% deployed, well under 80% cap. Banking sector exposure (ICICIBANK + MAHABANK) is ~18% of capital — still below 35% sector cap; could add BANKBEES if breadth persists but prefer to let current positions work first. Current positions are all earnings-beat momentum trades bought on Day 1; priority on Day 2 is risk management (SLs in place) rather than adding. Day 2 of 180 — long runway, no need to force trades. Will reassess tomorrow after price action confirms or rejects today's moves."
}
